The '''Chief Justice''' was the senior of the twelve justices in the [[Supreme Court/Legends|Supreme Court]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. As such, the Chief Justice was the head of both the Supreme Court and the Republic's judicial branch of government.

An [[Unidentified Chief Justice|unknown male]] was the Chief Justice in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] who oversaw [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum's]] corruption trial just prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

The Chief Justice was replaced by the [[First Justice]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Court of Justice]].

In [[43 ABY|43.5 ABY]] [[Uved Pledesin]] served as Chief Justice on the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] Court of Justice.
